name: Draco Berserker of the Tenyi
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>威</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>い</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>龍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>鬼</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Fierce Dragon God of the Tenyi
desc:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters
When your opponent activates a monster effect (Quick Effect): You can banish it. If this attacking card destroys an Effect Monster by battle and sends it to the GY: This card gains ATK equal to the destroyed monster's original ATK, also it can make a second attack on a monster during this Battle Phase. You can only use each effect of "Draco Berserker of the Tenyi" once per turn.

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
summoning: Does not require specific Synchro Materials
attack: Can make multiple attacks on monsters
banished: Banishes from your opponent's Extra Deck
